message:
feat(fnp): port float_power/remainder/fmod from NumPy passthrough to native Rust

- Add pub fn float_power(), remainder(), and fmod() to fnp-ufunc
- Add native_binary_float_power_or_passthrough and remainder helpers
- Update fnp-python bindings to use native for simple cases:
  - float_power: x**y always returning float
  - remainder/mod: Python-style (sign follows divisor)
  - fmod: C-style (sign follows dividend)
- Add conformance_float_power_remainder.rs harness with 14 oracle tests:
  - Basic operations
  - Negative base/divisor handling
  - remainder vs fmod sign difference
  - Division by zero (returns NaN)
  - 50+ random inputs
  - Broadcasting
  - mod as alias for remainder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
